name: Toss Your Body
description: DANCERS WANTED CALL 1-833-DO-YOU-DANCE Calling all dancers to the floor for the premiere of Brooklyn’s newest TV Dance Show: Toss Your Body! Do you dance? Can you command the floor? If so, come and show us what you got! Turn a look and give it for the camera, baby! We’re kicking it off with tunes selected by Will Jack and Giovannii of TOSSD, and after you’re warmed up, DJ Shannon takes over to keep your body moving with one of the brightest sounds in the city. We want to make sure you get all your twists and twirls out for those cameras, so the legendary MikeQ will be joining us to conclude the night. While the cameras are rolling, our host, Passa Flora, will be keeping an eye out for the fiercest of looks and the smoothest of moves throughout the party, giving you a chance to bust a move and jack that body for the show. So come on down to Paragon 990 Broadway at 10:00pm, Thursday, July 23 and try your moves for the camera, darlin’! Will you make the final cut? Tune into the first episode of Toss Your Body to find out! Disclaimer: Toss Your Body is a filmed dance party and show. Entry permits the use of your likeness for video content on social and streaming platforms. This might result in local clout, fierce clips for your grid, and of course, sweat - if you're doing it right! A ticket guarantees entry but does not guarantee appearance on the show. Brought to you by TOSSD!

name: Bruno Limma, Jack Mulqueen b2b Choukroun
description: Brazilian-born selector Bruno Limma brings a hypnotic, groove-forward approach rooted in minimal, tech house, and afterhours psychedelia. Known for patient builds and fluid pacing, his sets lean deep into tension, repetition, and subtle dancefloor control. Joining him, NYC’s Jack Mulqueen and Choukroun link for a back-to-back session shaped by rolling low-end pressure, stripped-back rhythms, and understated late-night energy. Together, the night settles firmly into deep club functionality and heads-down momentum. RSVPs are one per person, so anyone coming with you will need to submit their own. We cut off RSVPs at 11pm, and you'll need to be checked in at the door by that time. Plan to arrive early rather than risk being in line when the clock hits 11. Keep in mind that an RSVP does not guarantee entry, as the venue can fill up. Buying a full price ticket ahead of time is the surest way to guarantee your spot. //////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////// To maintain a safe and enjoyable environment for all, we ask that you respect our house code of conduct: no phones on the dance floor and zero tolerance for harassment, discrimination, or hate.

name: Groove Therapy: Father Sheed, Sam Clark, Karl - Dead Letter No.9
description: Groove Therapy arrives at Dead Letter No. 9 on Thursday, July 23rd, bringing its signature approach to intimate dance floors, long-form sets, and carefully curated house and minimal selections. With a focus on atmosphere, sound, and creating space for the music to unfold naturally, the series has become known for nights that reward both deep listening and deep dancing. Leading the evening is Brooklyn-based producer and DJ Father Sheed, whose sets move effortlessly through house, electro, breaks, and synth-driven club music. Fresh off releases on M.A.D Records, he blends forgotten gems, off-center grooves, and driving dance floor cuts into sets that are equal parts hypnotic and unexpected. Joining him are Karl and Sam Clark, rounding out a night of warm grooves, eclectic selections, and music designed to keep the room moving from the first record to the last. Venue opens at 5PM | Happy Hour 5PM-7PM | Music 7PM-Midnight Kitchen open late | 21+

name: study hall ; livecode sessions w MDN expressions in ambient, dub, and jungle
description: study hall ; livecode sessions w MDN expressions in ambient, dub, and jungle will be a 3 hour livecode set, cast on the Dirtywave M8 tracker. MDN takes the listener into deep tide / somatic stillness within the spatial sound of the Reforesters Laboratory. This improvisational form has grown over time in yoga residencies, contact improv sessions, and forest bathing events. Compile + Flow into ambient, minimal techno, and trip-hop narratives, as we hike through the bardo. --- MDN (they/them/we) is the project of M DeNardo Their livecode spells in M8 tracker and Hydra Video Synth conjure visions of constellations, meditation, and infinity. Their tape release ‘black_hole’ addresses near-death experiences during childhood and the hypothesis that "all beings are singularity material."

name: PEPPERPOT: girl_irl, amita, NINE11, CH3RI, Samantha DaSilva, DJ ANEE
description: Introducing PEPPERPOT a genre-blending dance party series inspired by the movement of music, people, and culture. Join us on the Honey's rooftop on Thursday, July 23, 8PM-2AM for a high-energy summer rooftop party celebrating club music in all its forms, featuring a lineup of boundary-pushing baddies, good people, and club music, well mixed. Founded by Brooklyn-based artist, Samantha DaSilva, the series takes its name from Guyana's national dish. With indigenous origins and countless regional variations shaped through migration, exchange, and generations of shared tradition, pepperpot serves as a fitting metaphor for the evolution of club music itself. Coming from a mixed Indo-Guyanese, Portuguese, Caribbean, and South American background, and growing up in diverse spaces across New York, Samantha has long been drawn to the ways music travels, across borders, communities, and generations. PEPPERPOT is an extension of that perspective: a space that honors the roots of music while celebrating the many paths it has taken and the cultures that continue to shape it. It's a celebration of curiosity over categories, connection over assumptions, and a reminder that some of the most meaningful moments on a dancefloor happen when people step outside the boxes they're expected to fit into.

name: SKIN2SKIN
description: Your favorite protected dance floor is back for another Bossa Nova takeover & we brought out the heavy hitters for the night! Joining us all the way from Houston for her SKIN2SKIN debut, we have the club princess, Miss Amarji King running the night alongside SEX CHANGE duo & S2S veterans, SEXINCHURCH & BLAIZE. Meet us on the dance floor & be prepared to move your body like you never have. FREE before 11pm, $10 after SKIN2SKIN is an experience curated for & by QTBIPOC folk. Everyone is welcomed but they MUST be respectful of community members or be removed. Bossa Nova Civic Club is 21+ Acceptable forms of identification include a Driver's License or Non-Driver ID card or passport. No racism, sexism, homophobia, transphobia or violence will be permitted. If you witness any harassment or otherwise unsavory behavior please inform security. Those who do not practice consent will be removed and banned. Enjoy.

name: ROMANCE w Eli Escobar
description: Aren't we blessed - every Thursday, a church of all churches, sermons served fresh by our priest Eli Escobar ... its good 2 b alive y'all! Romance is Eli’s dream party. Dreams do come true. BIG EMOTIONS SAD BANGERS POP ISN’T A DIRTY WORD CRYING ENCOURAGED Doors + DJs at 9PM FREE every Thursday Gabriela is a dream we had when we needed music the most. A blissful escape that brings us together. ~ Our mission is to create an energetic and engaged dance floor, where people of all backgrounds have a safe place to express themselves. Have as much fun as possible, but never at anyone else’s expense. Admittance to our venue is determined at the door in an effort to create what we dreamt up. We have a very intimate space and we hope you appreciate and respect the door staff. Consent is mandatory! It is sexy! Be mindful of the people sharing space with you. We have a ZERO tolerance policy for discrimination, harassment or violence of any kind. Alert staff if you need help. In order to allow people to immerse themselves in our dance floor, please keep phone use, chatting and flash photography to a minimum. There are plenty of other spaces to lounge in the rest of the club if you’re feeling called to doing any of these things. Take care of yourself and each other. xo

name: Sunni D + Arjun Shah
description: Making his NYC debut all the way from London, Sunni D teams up with Arjun Shah for a night of soulful grooves from across the world. Expect a vibrant journey through disco, house, Latin and Afro-Caribbean sounds, and more. Free all night __________ Jupiter Disco is a safe space for all. Our most important goal is to ensure everyone who steps into our space feels welcome and safe. In order to achieve this goal, it's mission critical that everyone approaches each other with respect. That means everyone. We are passionate about bringing people together and building connections between participants in and adjacent to our community. Go ahead and say hi to someone new while you're here with us! If you see or experience anything that makes you feel uncomfortable, please alert one of our team members and we will coordinate a resolution immediately. We encourage everyone to be present and interface with the physical elements around you while you're with us, so we ask that you please limit your phone use throughout the space. Phone screen and camera lights can also be distracting, so please be mindful of the brightness and the length of time you use those lights, if at all. If you intend to smoke (anything), please take a break outside and take a few steps down the block. Don't worry, we always have re-entry.

name: Vigilante presents: Maayan Nidaam
description: Vigilante's year-long residency with Outer Heaven continues, this time with Perlon's Maayan Nidam. Maayan Nidam, also performing as THE WAVES, is an artist in flux, continues to change, evolve and challenge boundaries both in her Berlin studio and on stage. Maayan Nidam, also performing as THE WAVES is an artist in flux, continues to change, evolve and challenge boundaries both in her Berlin studio and on stage. She has built a reputation as a fine producer, live performer & DJ who favours a subtle approach towards mesmeric moments. Her DJ sets, predominantly based in stripped-back, deep sounds, utilise an intriguing vinyl collection, using obscure interludes for re-contextualisation. This approach makes for some magical moments on the dance-floor, where a night’s highlight may come from the most unlikely of tracks. As a musician obsessed about sound and the technology behind its creation, her workflow places a strong focus on the studio environment. Triggering chain reactions between guitar pedals, drum machines, modular synths and acoustic instruments, generating sounds in unpredictable, exciting ways. As THE WAVES, Maayan has developed a solo live set that allows her to further her studio experiments and take them on the road. With a flexibly evolving range of hardware, she re-creates the spontaneous frame of her productions, delving deep into the possibilities of live dubbing and improvisation, keeping the performance exciting for both the crowd and Maayan herself.

name: CLÜBSESSION VOL.7 TASTE THE RAINBOW B2B2B
description: Calling all Dj's calling all Dj's.... Come with your best picks and get ready to mingle with your fellow Selectas at the Rainbow Tutu X Clübsession B2B2B extravaganza! Learn some tips and tricks from @rainbowtutudi and your fellow colleagues in the dj world right here in the lower east side on July 23rd going from 8pm to 2am. It'll be an opportunity to strengthen your skills and relationships with your fellow nyc djs so bookmark it in your calendar and tell all your friends! Djs and dancers alike Please come with your USBs formatted for Rekordbox! 4 + Learn to Dj with Rainbow Tutu from 8 to 9pm and stay tuned for a special set afterwards to open up the learning portion for brand new djs who want to give it a shot! From 9:30-10:30pm, all beginners get 20 minutes per set to show us what you've learned! At 10:30 we're kicking off into the B2B2B it'll be a night you won't want to miss! name: SOUND OF SWEAT
description: SOUND OF SWEAT is a guided sound experience brought to life in partnership with Christine Alfred and Sam Wilensky. Christine is a Haitian multidisciplinary artist, meditation teacher, therapeutic sound and energy practitioner. Sam is an NYC-based Yin Yoga, Yoga Nidrā, Meditation and Sound teacher. Come by after work, sweat it out, meet a new friend or lover, feel something. ✩ WHAT TO EXPECT ✩ ꩜ 5:00PM + 5:30PM sauna slots join Christine’s 6PM sound meditation ꩜ 6:00PM + 6:30PM sauna slots join Sam’s 7PM sound meditation ꩜ Aromatic infusions with organic essential oils in the sauna at the top of every hour NOTE: for those wanting longer sessions, we encourage you to book back-to-back slots. ✩ ABOUT YOUR GUIDES ✩ Christine Alfred is a meditation teacher, therapeutic sound, energy practitioner, and the founder of Awarehouse. Through sound, she guides others to listen to the most subtle layers of themselves, allowing them to gain insights beyond ordinary perception. Sam Wilensky is a Brooklyn-based teacher of yin yoga, yoga nidrā, meditation and sound. Her offerings embrace the qualities of “Yin” as an all-day-long practice — a way of being that honors receptivity, patience, and the wisdom of ease. She weaves contemplative traditions with somatic awareness, for the discovery of all that's available when we release effort and yield to what is. Her teaching invites an artful exploration of the body, breath and mind, and an opportunity to soften beyond even the most stubborn habits of tension. ✩ WHAT TO BRING ✩ Swimsuit Towel Water-friendly footwear ✩ CHANGING ROOMS ✩ Private changing pods will be available, along with shelves to store your belongings. We recommend arriving with your swimsuit already on. ✩ SAFER SPACE ✩ All bodies, all genders, all sizes. Consent and care are non-negotiable. No harassment, hate, or aggressive behavior. No alcohol. ✩ ACCESSIBILITY ✩ Ground-level outdoor garden with mixed paving and soil. Seating available in and near the sauna. Share access needs in advance with hi@culdesacculdesac.xyz and we'll do our best to accommodate. ✩ COMMUNITY ✩ This is a leave-no-trace event. Please respect the garden and treat the space as your own. Rain, snow, or shine, we sweat. Severe weather may delay. By attending you consent to respectful community documentation in public zones.

name: Head Hifi Listening Series presents Kelela Take Me Apart
description: Special Instructions is an archival project exploring the intersections of music, memory, and preservation hosted by DJ and librarian Ella Hussle. For the next session, join us as we take a closer listen to Kelela's album Take Me Apart, on Head HiFi's vintage Klipsch La Scala speakers. This is a gathering to listen to music and one another. Join us.

name: Secret Tempo (theguyfromathens)
description: On July 23 at Bar Bonobo, Aris returns with a carefully curated selection of soulful house, deep grooves, and disco-infused rhythms. Guided by feeling and connection, his sets are designed to create moments of energy, emotion, and togetherness on the dance floor — where the music takes the lead and every track tells a story.

name: Support Women DJs Open Decks
description: *Please only sign up if you identify as a woman or nonbinary DJ (trans babes are so welcome)* Delirium also hosts an all genders open decks every Tuesday. Every Thursday 7:30pm-12:30am at Delirium in East Williamsburg, Brooklyn. 30 minute slots with 2x Pioneer DJ XDJ-1000MK2 decks and Pioneer DJM-900 NXS2 mixer. Just bring a USB and headphones. Please ensure you are formatting your USB correctly in advance. All genres of music are welcome. This is a safe space for you to experiment and have fun. You will receive a confirmation email and a flyer with your DJ name on it in the week leading up to your set. BYOB- We encourage you to bring your friends to dance! $10 entry at the door. Because we do not sell drinks, this covers our studio operating costs.

name: SPS Collective presents: The Inception
description: SPS Collective Presents: The Inception A new chapter begins at Moondog. The Inception is an immersive evening of live performance, curated art, and creative exchange, bringing together artists and audiences in celebration of community and collaboration. Rooted in the belief that art is meant to be shared, SPS Collective transforms the space into a platform for emerging voices, thoughtful expression, and meaningful connection. Whether you're coming to experience the performances, explore the artwork, or simply be part of the energy, join us for a night where creativity takes center stage and community comes first.

name: B JACK$ & Friends
description: B JACK$ first NYC headline show, celebrating one year of his debut album NO GUEST LIST Surprise special guests TBA Hosted by JESSVKA Sounds by Malcolm Flex & more TBA B Jack$ is a rising force out of Essex County, New Jersey, known for his high-energy delivery, Lil Wayne-inspired wordplay, and a signature tone that cuts through. He first made waves with a viral feature on GROOVY’s Jersey Luv, spotlighting his role in the Jersey Club movement. A key figure in the Slizzy Entertainment crew, he’s also a frequent collaborator of Cash Cobain, helping push the boundaries of Sexy Drill. Complex noted, “Among the crop of rising Jersey rappers who are able to spit on sped-up New York drill production, B Jack$ has been able to set himself apart.” That momentum led to No Guest List — his debut full-length project, released in June 2025. A concept album about flipping rejection into recognition, it reflects the world he’s built: one where self-worth takes center stage and B Jack$’ life is the party.
address: 204 Varick Street, New York, NY 10014-4810, USA
